nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Stephen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Usual English spelling of the name of the first Christian martyr (Acts 6–7), whose feast is accordingly celebrated next after Christ's own ( 26 December ). His name is derived from the Greek word stephanos ‘garland, crown’.

variants.name: Stephan
meanings: Variant of   Stephen  , preserving the vowels of the Greek name.

variants.name: Steven
meanings: Variant of   Stephen  , reflecting the normal pronunciation of the name in the English-speaking world.

en.lifeSummary: Stephen de Peplesham was born in 1279, in Sussex, England, United Kingdom. He had at least 1 son with Peplesham. He died in 1323, in St Leonards-on-Sea, East Sussex, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 44, and was buried in St Leonards-on-Sea, East Sussex, England, United Kingdom.

ja.lifeSummary: Stephen de Pepleshamは1279年にイギリスイギリススセックスで生まれた。彼はPepleshamとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は1323年にイギリスイギリスエアスト スセックススト レオナルドス-オン-セアで44歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスエアスト スセックススト レオナルドス-オン-セアにて埋葬された。

ko.St Leonards-on-Sea, East Sussex, England: 영국 잉글랜드 이스트 수세스 스트 리나르드스--시
ko.lifeSummary: Stephen de Peplesham(은)는 1279년 영국 잉글랜드 수세스에서 태어났다. 그는 Peplesham(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1323년 영국 잉글랜드 이스트 수세스 스트 리나르드스--시에서 44세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 이스트 수세스 스트 리나르드스--시에 묻혔다.
